subcodes.first_line: O Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin! Give glad-tidings unto Our servants of the remembrance of God, the True King, the Manifest One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین المقربین بشر عبادنا بذکر الله الملک الحق المبین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
